backend/main.mo: Defines data types and logic for products, filtering, user profiles, and authorization, storing products and profiles in maps.
feature_evidence.json: Lists implemented features, their associated source files, components, and test IDs for build traceability.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of all frontend files for documentation or tooling use.
frontend/index.css: Provides global Tailwind CSS variables and styles for light and dark themes with neutral color palettes.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app layout rendering header, catalog page, footer, profile setup dialog, and toast provider with theme support.
frontend/src/components/Auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button handling Internet Identity auth flow and clearing React Query cache.
frontend/src/components/Auth/ProfileSetu: Dialog for first‑time users to submit name, optional skin type, and concerns with validation and profile saving.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppHeader: Header displaying logo, title, optional user greeting, and login button based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component showing product image, name, brand, category, skin type, and formatted price with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/ProductDetailsDi: Dialog component that loads a product by ID, displays its details, and supports editing and deletion.
frontend/src/components/ProductFormDialo: Form dialog for creating or editing a product with validation and submission to backend mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuthz.ts: Hooks for fetching and saving the current user's profile through the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context and provider managing Internet Identity login, logout, identity loading, and state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductMutations.t: React Query mutations for creating, updating, and deleting products with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductQueries.ts: React Query hooks for filtering products and fetching product details by ID.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and CSS variables defining light and dark theme tokens.
frontend/src/lib/productFilters.ts: Utility functions for formatting product categories, skin types, currencies, and parsing ingredients and concerns.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point setting up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and rendering the root component.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: React page rendering a skincare catalog with search, filters, product grid, and dialogs for viewing or creating products using query-based data fetching.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters and session-stored values, supporting both query and hash routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending theme colors, fonts, animations, and enabling plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: JSON file describing the project's current state, features, requirements, and image asset needs for the skincare app.
